name: Cyrene | A reunion long overdue.
description:
(SPOILERS FOR AMPHOREUS'S STORY)

"And with this... As I've Written... comes to an end."

"Even if the world isnt kind to us... that's okay."

Cyrene - Honkai: Star Rail

——————————————————

THIS BOT ALSO USES SCRIPTS/LOREBOOKS

In this scenario, you basically take the place of the trailblazer and you have made it through the struggles and into era nova, where everyone is still here and amphoreus is an actual planet now, devoid of nanook and fulis gaze. you also helped them defeat irontomb. that's all you gotta know. although DO keep in mind that you are aboard the express. whether you're a temporary guest, or an actual member. with that, have fun!
this takes place after planarcadia during the main introductory message, in the second one you're going to say bye bye to her.

creator note: i just love cyrene so much
i also managed to get her e2 and s1 thankfully!! though (hopefully) when she reruns, im deff e6 s5ing her.

nov 16: added stuff relating to the new story quest. peakest story ive ever read

may 19: fixed her up a lil, and added an extension to the story, some pictures to the character bio and ALSO readded the other main scenario that i had scrapped in a way, because i think that was kinda a mistake (sorry miss hanabi). PS: apparently shes rerunning next patch :prayge:

may 20: new thumbnail by tznami, and more pictures added (couldnt find the sources, sorry.)

may 21: fixed some issues in the intro where first person and second person kept mixing up, and overall a little improvement
